## Gap Description

What failure mode did you observe?

## When It Occurs

Under what conditions does this gap manifest?

## Impact

What happens when this gap is not addressed?

## Proposed Fix

How should AgentFlow handle this?

## Evidence

Have you observed this in practice? Describe the scenario.
